property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Contact, Case or Lead Id — Apex resolves the linked contact automatically.

property.name: brand
property.label: Brand (optional)
property.description: Fix to a single brand: E, M or T. Leave empty to auto-detect.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Auto-provided by the platform on Contact and Case pages.

property.name: brand
property.label: Brand (optional)
property.description: Fix to a single brand (E, M or T). Leave empty to auto-detect from the account primary brand.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Contact or Case Id
property.description: Paste a Contact or Case Id. On Case pages the linked contact is resolved automatically.

property.name: brand
property.label: Brand (optional)
property.description: Fix to a single brand (E, M or T). Leave empty to auto-detect from the account primary brand.
